name: Leah Vukmir
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The debate tonight was a huge victory for our campaign, and I just wanted to say, I couldn’t have done it without you.

Friend,

The debate tonight was a huge victory for our campaign, and I just wanted to say, I couldn’t have done it without you.

Before I went out there, my team let me know how many supporters were taking a stand for me – and against Tammy Baldwin's radical socialist policies – as I fight for our values and an agenda that puts Wisconsin – not Washington – first.

It helped me fight tonight. It reminded me of how capable we are of bringing our Wisconsin Way to Washington.

And friend, this debate victory is going to help us do it!

My team and I are going to do everything we can to share our message and get the word out on tonight's victory. [**Can you chip in to the Debate Emergency Fund to help us do it?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5cMWNcCUBqlEspxvZTzeKBk3mB7EeE1oRcQclFmxdMULVze6BnuJBvVIAC2et5sI8CEnSWsmt9BG3SOS9BwR-gtE3BfGhDen45lM_s1PY7i1rHRFVF7-W7aeULZ_L51ol-fmVLkr-ME5PMjmd_sFQoRxiEEOfyvez0EAO4U-cjdDnEB63uUx2OHmMJ_SIQke6TK1KKjtUs0zTotd9Rz5bIxjK9Tn-xUCNqQsHrlJL4HdeOG0Ek-MfQtY09Uie_yJ6yFuHLnyhQJJjxajL882fQT29JZWk25KqT2einv6dzf21vrZqNE8XnuqsnK_Z3oLKTRQ1PFst0IoC8CAOuMvpmT2NC8gFCFmM0p5ozjgSBuQyLckg8_j1fPqNYS-3l7Xntuo0z4exoO0etchZXfgpRQ%3D)

Everything we said tonight proves WE have the best plan for middle class Wisconsinites and it's time to send Tammy Baldwin packing.

I want everyone who didn't get to watch to hear it from us! I hope you’ll help out by chipping in now.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=xC_5HRAah8_47ZDq6pmRMB7pRqym5PCuaojgxeaiwW9oRKv5z_j8FXbEd5zqG8MEVSzOOR4v_hMZB1Ui7jIhR2CqmeNE35kf6v1BlOiCEzSi4_rcvrVUfVxllLYoQvFTIZzZ00yHlhm6zSmLt7vbZ8BZvFIAEFDmSR45CimkaScl_M53SIKduboMBfDLhlnXNgXwB0Q1VayiWc2YzJpR2rxU4kC2pB1RIpkpjqHYvXlim6SJM2aSyJ15-OXJVKDl). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5ZpbNTOIlspTBnwfjtk6PtJJBoaivJavJo_swiuJQwQML4hmkP0NLnRyTs6xpSmb12VFjbGhTxlYqU0hQK7qlrRNGYaUUy4rmfu_C03NKZ1R0Rm70jH_6r6DfAVQ7RKCT_DUmR3tBONM_OU7OtTkYVuEOU7gtzetJEpW6x4xnMi4yB3BNBnIWkSOoAyGA7WwH8T4Sx1KMCWg8km9awiknnOuSEsK2N6QN3g-P0CiHYqQjq082c8nK7VzqdfFWECDOuYo_lFQGZTnZC22zLYoyZr3fS51V4oNi_J-qpTD_i43bsv66MQPj2ZpT1RTUFyohp_MQOh_OOF5DVyjO9BfNKEJZmvEabT9Zyl-IhspEDcS) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5ZpbNTOIlspTBnwfjtk6PtKMrFlXDSMyYWiXwSeHsGALXOcdmVzkgQQpJ7IpzUaAr71O72krL4V3KcHIijoGvx5k2vL8HepPdj8wpFyW6sCSxwzguHIYkmpvvs8NuiMVUuEmeLna7zgj0VhbYzPBC44BJl51liNnpuoPedd0FUbn0VroRsetYlLbxb5fb2RQku_7VWi1WXQBJwCUn6T-sgcE2BuiOHn289sCV99-CR3LiskZx69ErFTNH900NLOVPNfuz0532pf5aei0lPfyYcdUsxFNXbOeNHEhpJktlPA2KVHrn1a6yP5p4C3tKsLls1Zyq1WYyvyiWeGiJvX9XdQwPhvnuyTUbxDWGUpG4qKY) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5RTJIxpoNtyHOsrLo9COLQSLddPkQ9Ymn_SfBCP12YQgBg2tKl1dYNOOnF6Bg-Wz2ojVeHVWBWKjORVUotKtrAhitSMPbjcKPsuDT-sV84QPrDfyJlb0aHpqmLkZLaklZlnl-mOVF2Ma0UMlHp5nHKFP53IEZYHwZXhx0N-J3fSg9l13A4NsT23RZKuSUdeP0cKYFdaDzdQmU3nLqkuBakL-h9XKfu87N9KMKxqoXHY2RNmJ11UobLhT8MA4CYqcAg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5fprJ50hp1mcu1UcBoKIs0AvxM0uF7-VOrjsMxS0tarknSB1Ton89WIAqrAXz8QJx_liKWzfTsh_or-US4UHUVTpU2Z0MyD94U0hBCHNki2A2DknJlFG2MiNhKQByB26O5nzLB4mE2sKDhSw7YY-s6tvOW4CECJdwWt-0Z-W5Do-W9Vi7oJR5qMpQ_0H6LX0zZBsKdldCxj_wWeywKS_vBX8tb2OnKqoe-ljdmlDWAvUpErY59ZhUp97J-sUMei4_Q%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5fj4i5AXMGgX-jQRlQzHkw5s11q5BZvlwxw1mZxqfQavTiGTOuFUIB4Lun8TlhIhyhgMwZCOskzWxQuVHUTVcYIW0FhBZblKrs8_0IaXrA6-_nk-M2pdGB6aSFf1A8EJfA6pPBXW2g16hgvZV7F3dCVkcM99h1hWm2c9zagQo-EgHO8sBthfQkRnLeIdyuVcBHEr90heRww53g-O5nvAkdZZ3tr5bUs5gwjntGagWZt3bSJtAhqwCyPNIPEMhnLIGA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=XvAvmH5yL86ovk4qK2Sw5ZpbNTOIlspTBnwfjtk6PtK5zekvKKL44OJv8lMFm9A5ikIm4C8k5EwFD637v-10NDgA3yf9u3RNnsqPwtqs_OsS5ulK5iMpBthI5x7b-n1pWHqKFbunmyx0pFSxRE1XMmid24rmoXjRAihwIBeZDEOlIUFJof0TIu9a7jlKO90AfdI0YoK2FF-JPNhFhkhgjfxyIi6VzMdmexf2eLyIgOk7GjYhqe19M3ClmyuaZ09ihQ8y6NNimCerY7F9gNQ-xKDYDsjJPuU00A2BLiEq52zfac-8gHPJU_5yEXw4RWgzFbbUEb3RKRRtQH372umqozR4kKjcm1HzC3o280O4LrAa8JlWB1P_UQEJ05AZokmK6nqIZpkMVFfyHw09xfrtKw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=xC_5HRAah8_47ZDq6pmRMB7pRqym5PCuaojgxeaiwW9oRKv5z_j8FXbEd5zqG8MEVSzOOR4v_hMZB1Ui7jIhR2CqmeNE35kf6v1BlOiCEzSi4_rcvrVUfVxllLYoQvFTIZzZ00yHlhm6zSmLt7vbZ8BZvFIAEFDmSR45CimkaScl_M53SIKduboMBfDLhlnXNgXwB0Q1VayiWc2YzJpR2rxU4kC2pB1RIpkpjqHYvXlim6SJM2aSyJ15-OXJVKDl) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9d361e107b74e8cbf693030485ae6ab&_e=xC_5HRAah8_47ZDq6pmRMB7pRqym5PCuaojgxeaiwW9oRKv5z_j8FXbEd5zqG8MEVSzOOR4v_hMZB1Ui7jIhR2CqmeNE35kf6v1BlOiCEzSi4_rcvrVUfVxllLYoQvFTIZzZ00yHlhm6zSmLt7vbZ8BZvFIAEFDmSR45CimkaScl_M53SIKduboMBfDLhlnXNgXwB0Q1VayiWc2YzJpR2rxU4kC2pB1RIpkpjqHYvXlim6SJM2aSyJ15-OXJVKDl) to unsubscribe. Friend, The debate tonight was a huge victory for our campaign, and I just wanted to say, I couldn’t have done it without you. Before I went out there, my team let me know how many supporters were taking a stand for me – and against Tammy Baldwin's radical socialist policies – as I fight for our values and an agenda that puts Wisconsin – not Washington – first. It helped me fight tonight. It reminded me of how capable we are of bringing our Wisconsin Way to Washington. And friend, this debate victory is going to help us do it! My team and I are going to do everything we can to share our message and get the word out on tonight's victory. Everything we said tonight proves WE have the best plan for middle class Wisconsinites and it's time to send Tammy Baldwin packing. I want everyone who didn't get to watch to hear it from us! I hope you’ll help out by chipping in now. Thank you, friend! -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Emily Daniels
subject: Hoosiers want leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhddjtd-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter The truth is, Sleepin’ Joe and his radical liberal cronies in Washington don’t care about Hoosier families or about confirming a highly qualified candidate to the Supreme Court. **This is all just a political game to them.** [**Their only goal was to delay the confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh until after the midterm election so they could use it as a liberal campaign issue.**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhddjtd-kujulhlke-j/) Hoosier families deserve better than a liberal puppet who only does what’s best for partisan politics rather than the American people. **Tell Sleepin’ Joe that you’re tired of the liberal political games.** Hoosiers want a real leader representing us in the Senate. Emily Daniels
Finance Director [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhddjtd-kujulhlke-t/) |

body:

[]()

| | Peter, I just walked off the stage after my debate with Rep. Braun, and I'll be blunt: The differences between us are stark.

As Indiana's hired help in the Senate, my job is to answer to _Hoosiers._ But not Rep. Braun -- he's ready to support every single one of President Trump's and Mitch McConnell's policies, no matter how extreme.

It's why he still wants to snatch away health care from the 1.1 million Hoosiers under 65 with pre-existing conditions. It's why he supported their tax scheme. And it's why he won't promise not to slash Social Security and Medicare benefits. **Hoosiers just can't trust him to fight for them in the Senate.**

**Peter, I 'm working nonstop over the next 29 days to win this election, but I can't do it without you. Will you pitch in to help keep a copy machine for President Trump out of the Senate? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for everything, Joe ******** ""******** | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

body:
Since the vote on Kavanaugh.

| Trump supporters, right-wing dark money groups, and super PACs are coming after Tina. **She 's counting on you to have her back in this critical moment and maintain Democratic momentum.** **[Donate](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181008PM_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181008PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, on Saturday I voted "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court -- and while it's been only 48 hours, we have seen Trump's base attack me again and again for my vote. I won't be intimidated, but, with less than a month left until Election Day and Trump targeting Minnesota, I am worried that we could lose momentum in the race. **A new NPR/PBS NewsHour/Marist poll showed the "Democratic enthusiasm advantage that has defined the 2018 campaign up to this point has disappeared."** And we know Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, so any loss of Democratic enthusiasm or momentum could tip this Senate race towards Republicans. That's why I'm asking you: [**Can you make your first contribution before midnight so we can win this critical race in November? name: Veterans and Military Families for Tabitha
subject: These are dangerous times, Friend. [Tabitha talks Veterans policy]
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Dear Friend,

On Wednesday, Tabitha will be hosting a press conference to announce her new policy for Veterans and Military Families (VAMF). Unless, of course, Hurricane Michael interrupts by bringing dangerous conditions to Dothan.

Hurricane or not, the sad truth is that Alabama is already a dangerous place for veterans . The 3 VA medical providers in the district provide the most egregious example:

- The Montgomery VA was just rated one of the worst VAs in the country.
- The Fort Rucker VA currently has no physicians on staff to see patients.
- The Dothan VA primary care clinic is closing as of November 30th.

But it's not just Veterans healthcare that is a swirling mess. We also learned this week that veteran suicide is on the rise and Alabama's veteran suicide rate is higher than the national average.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/veterans%20at%20casino%20%282%29.jpg] (Photo Caption: Tabitha meets with veterans in Wetumpka to get their input on needed policy changes.)

We also learned that 60% of the service members assigned to Maxwell Air Force base are choosing to leave their families behind while they posted here because they don't want to subject their children to the failing Montgomery Public Schools.

For too long, the Democratic party has stayed away from VAMF issues, perhaps because of an assumption that all veterans and military families vote Republican. But caring for our neighbors in need should never depend on whether our neighbors are on our "team." Partisanship should never stand in the way of us speaking loudly and clearly about the need to care for veterans who are hurting because of the wars we sent them to. About the need to care for military families who are blown about by the ever-changing winds of post assignments and deployments.

It's time for the Democratic party to commit to keeping our promises to veterans and military families just as we have committed to keeping our promises to Seniors. It's time for us to offers veterans and military families a safe shelter from the storm.

Come read my plan [https://tabithaisner.com/focus-on-veterans/] for re-upping our commitment to veterans and military families . And join us for one or more of our upcoming events focused on the VAMF community:

- October 14, 3-5pm: VAMF Cook-Out (with Walt Maddox) at Pratt Park in Prattville
- October 17, 6pm: Veterans Town Hall at Perry Recreation Center in Ozark

clean_body: [] Dear Friend, On Wednesday, Tabitha will be hosting a press conference to announce her new policy for Veterans and Military Families (VAMF). Unless, of course, Hurricane Michael interrupts by bringing dangerous conditions to Dothan. Hurricane or not, the sad truth is that Alabama is already a dangerous place for veterans . The 3 VA medical providers in the district provide the most egregious example: - The Montgomery VA was just rated one of the worst VAs in the country. - The Fort Rucker VA currently has no physicians on staff to see patients. - The Dothan VA primary care clinic is closing as of November 30th. But it's not just Veterans healthcare that is a swirling mess. We also learned this week that veteran suicide is on the rise and Alabama's veteran suicide rate is higher than the national average. [] (Photo Caption: Tabitha meets with veterans in Wetumpka to get their input on needed policy changes.) We also learned that 60% of the service members assigned to Maxwell Air Force base are choosing to leave their families behind while they posted here because they don't want to subject their children to the failing Montgomery Public Schools. For too long, the Democratic party has stayed away from VAMF issues, perhaps because of an assumption that all veterans and military families vote Republican. But caring for our neighbors in need should never depend on whether our neighbors are on our "team." Partisanship should never stand in the way of us speaking loudly and clearly about the need to care for veterans who are hurting because of the wars we sent them to. About the need to care for military families who are blown about by the ever-changing winds of post assignments and deployments. It's time for the Democratic party to commit to keeping our promises to veterans and military families just as we have committed to keeping our promises to Seniors. It's time for us to offers veterans and military families a safe shelter from the storm. Come read my plan [] for re-upping our commitment to veterans and military families . And join us for one or more of our upcoming events focused on the VAMF community: - October 14, 3-5pm: VAMF Cook-Out (with Walt Maddox) at Pratt Park in Prattville - October 17, 6pm: Veterans Town Hall at Perry Recreation Center in Ozark - October 18, 6pm: Tabitha visits VFW Post 6020 in Daleville Help me help Veterans and Military Families. Donate $25 today! Donate Now! [] Connect With Us: Facebook [] Twitter [] Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to: PO Box 6340 Montgomery, AL 36106 Campaign HQ Address: 1460 Ann St. Montgomery, AL 36107

| | | Fellow American, I'm sure you've seen it in the national news, but I'd like to reiterate: There is serious hostility towards the founding principles of liberty on college campuses. Many college students are not taught the true meaning of terms like "Freedom" and "Equality." They are accepting false promises of free college and health care and voting for candidates who wish to embrace that fantasy. This is evidenced by the voting records of millennials in the last election, where **many more voted for Bernie Sanders in the primaries than both Clinton and Trump combined.** Worst of all, students on college campuses refuse to engage with those whom they disagree. Instead, many resort to intimidation, threats, and rioting in a manner that incites violence. I'm curious to know what you think about the state of higher education in America. If you have a few minutes, I'd love to ask you a few questions about the state of America's education system, and whether the damage to it can be repaired. Take the survey now >> [**https://www.research.net/r/hillsdale_higher_education_survey**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjgyLTgzNzQ5MjUxYjMwYjQ1OTg5MTZjNGU5ZmVmNTcxYThl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1AzMTAwOTE4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1oaWdoZXJlZHVjYXRpb25zdXJ2ZXkmYXBwZWFsX2NvZGU9TUs4MTdFTTM&K=t36Gy2vbHWQ4agcyyFKNWA) | [**Take the Survey**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjgyLTgzNzQ5MjUxYjMwYjQ1OTg5MTZjNGU5ZmVmNTcxYThl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1AzMTAwOTE4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1oaWdoZXJlZHVjYXRpb25zdXJ2ZXkmYXBwZWFsX2NvZGU9TUs4MTdFTTM&K=UzAqD0rqsbcoUWaBMg_KUg)

subject: Justice Kavanaugh Could Have Big Impact Early on Supreme Court
body:
| |
---
#
# **_Justice Kavanaugh Could Have Big Impact Early on Supreme Court_**
#
Supreme Court Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh, who was sworn in as America’s 114th Justice at a White House ceremony last night, “will hear oral arguments at the high court for the first time Tuesday in cases dealing with criminal matters where his vote is expected to have a big impact,” Alex Swoyer reports for _The Washington Times_. “He has taken the seat of retired Justice Anthony M. Kennedy, who was viewed as the court’s swing vote between the other four Republican-appointed justices and the four more liberal members of the court.” [**Click here to read more**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/8/brett-kavanaugh-could-have-big-impact-early-on-sup/) “New Supreme Court Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh has made good on his pledge to hire women to serve as his law clerks, becoming the first justice to have an all-female staff,” Robert Barnes writes in [**_The Washington Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/courts_law/kavanaugh-makes-good-on-his-pledge-at-hearing-to-hire-women-as-law-clerks/2018/10/07/06e4893a-ca92-11e8-a3e6-44daa3d35ede_story.html?noredirect=on&utm_term=.97b20227ebc0). “Kavanaugh said during his Senate confirmation hearings that he has made a special effort to hire women after reading a story years ago about the unequal balance between men and woman hired for prestigious clerkships at the Supreme Court and for other federal judges.” After Justice Kavanaugh received the judicial oath from retired Justice Kennedy last night, he said that the Senate confirmation process had tested him “but did not change me,” Dave Boyer writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/8/brett-kavanaugh-gives-donald-trump-new-win/). “My approach to judging remains the same,” Justice Kavanaugh said. “A good judge must be an umpire, a neutral and impartial decider. A judge must interpret the law, not make the law.” “Americans are paying more to cover the costs of illegal immigrants having children in the United States than Congress plans to give President Trump in border wall funding this year, according to an explosive new analysis of Census Bureau data,” Paul Bedard reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/shock-report-us-paying-more-for-illegal-immigrant-births-than-trumps-wall). “The new report reveals that women in the United States illegally had 297,000 children in 2014 at a cost of $2.4 billion. That is $800 million more than the Senate has approved for Trump’s border wall this year and enough to pay for the wall over 10 years.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk1OTY5MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NTk2OTM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MzQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

Tonight you heard Mike lay out his vision for Indiana, bringing more jobs and security to our great state. All we heard from Joe Donnelly was insider politics and liberal talking points. Mike told it like it is. He is a job creator, a problem solver and a Hoosier through and through. Contribute to our campaign today so we can keep this momentum going all the way to Election Day! Thank you for your continued support, together we will elect Mike Braun to the U.S. Senate this November! Ben Mitchell Campaign Manager | ---|---|--- You're receiving this email because you subscribed via our , or donated to our campaign but you may if you're no longer interested. Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

Peter,

The Great Lakes provide fresh drinking water to millions of Americans. They are an invaluable natural resource and they must be protected.

Polluting these waters poses a huge risk to all of our health, not to mention the environment and wildlife of the lakes. Yet — it happens regularly.

**That’s why Dan has introduced a groundbreaking plan to BAN the dumping of sewage waste into the Great Lakes.**

**Protecting our clean drinking water should come before the needs of polluters. Dan is fighting to make that happen.**

[**_If you’re with us, answer our survey here to help exert grassroots pressure and make this plan a reality._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2553441/15053902/1106817531?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2VmMjU0Yy1lMmNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdc_OA0MeiqtG6PW2RzQrqyiQIzOxv_uQIczjWkbs_A=&emci=96ef254c-e2cb-e811-af11-000d3a13319d&emdi=97ef254c-e2cb-e811-af11-000d3a13319d&ceid=2478574&contactdata=qvLaw%2BzqRV941GwTW8qVpuFzlwJjP3Z7Q%2Bbf6NUS6J%2FxVdiDe33xkj%2B06x0%2FTmC2c5%2FDQ3AnvZ2BXvfmasLgkTKAaS4hCo49nKUiYQEQGK%2B8cc1VbZF%2FjYiqf1T%2BOBJx)

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Preparing for Hurricane Michael ☑️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/WdyUY3uDhH-nvUUU62s-yq7O49-bh1m5o7kxZZjKXM0=) Friends and Neighbors -- As of the latest forecast, hurricane warnings are now in effect for over 300 miles of the Gulf Coast of Florida and most forecast models currently have Hurricane Michael making landfall in the Panhandle sometime Wednesday afternoon. **This is a big and dangerous storm, if you haven 't already now is the time to get prepared.** Your smartphone can be the most powerful way to get prepared before the storm and help you navigate what comes after. **Consider downloading the following apps or bookmarking the following websites:**
* **The Federal Emergency Management Agency: **app at _** **__**[fema.gov/mobile-app](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/1BRqxtIgrM_kPRtWIBivJetESjeAIqAyUglagb8oL-c=)**** **_ and web page at **[ready.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/M6b9AGnqs0cGBNHaC3iwarTKC3tsE5f_ndk6x9MWlZw=)****.** Offers storm preparation tips, shelter maps and maps of disaster recovery centers.

* **Find an Evacuation Route:** Go to _** [ FL511.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/IqoKgS-tE5dfONpoemj2VwBGxM0UAElaNJu0mJmQj5Q=) **_or the FL511 app. If you're evacuating, these sites provide a guide to road and bridge closures, toll suspensions and evacuation routes. You can also go to them after the storm to check road conditions and road closures.

* **Find Local Shelters:** Go to** _[floridaevacuates.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/t2W8gnoec4XFNVb5LTLVQH4nH6gVLmpKQVmfvZyq8QI=)_.** Enter your location to find the nearest open shelter. You can also download their app.
* **Power Outages: **Report outages at** _[fpl.com/outage](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/PuI3OR1lUBzEI93zluO1qFww2lNK0lSQXa6-YmX5Qhk=)_ **or call 800-4-OUTAGE. To check power outages in your neighborhood, go to** _[fplmaps.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/vMlJ9FlEXntjXndZo5RFbjjgSpZj_Fu-DGERI169tec=)_****,** where you can find the total outages in your area, the cause and estimates for when power will be restored.
* **First Aid for People and Pets: **Two Red Cross apps give advice on first aid for people and pets. Find them here: _**[redcross.org/get-help/pr epare-for-emergencies/mobile-apps](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/eEHcwTeApFa65R4O7YeFEGNRoeoyuBEP8whhvpDj-U0=)**_

Home improvement stores, gas stations, and grocery stores are likely to be busy as the storm approaches, which is why it is important to have a list planned out ahead of time. Here is a great sample checklist:
> * **Bottled water: **Figure on 20 gallons for a family of four.
>

> * **Fruit, canned and dry goods:** 20 cans of tuna, chicken, beans, chili, soups, can opener; fresh fruit; peanut butter, powdered drink mix, juices, cookies, cracker, chips, bread, pet food.
>

> * **Medications:** Be sure you have prescription medications for up to two weeks.
>

> * **Batteries:** All sizes to power flashlights.
>

> * **Paper goods:** Freezer bags, garbage bags, paper plates, paper towels and bleach and bug spray
>

> Or, you can create your own based on the size of your family **[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/OPWq4LvgqpMzIQiP9A5F0aN2_sGIIWIrtz37Km3lFeY=). **
In addition to normal preparations like filling your vehicles with gas, buying fuel for generators, getting cash and identifying evacuation routes and storm shelters, _n_[ow is a really good time to review your home and flood insurance plans - and to obtain insurance if you do not already have it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/sVvmvcz-je5lGgtAanqMMQ3MjQTLYBS3fT09Aaf-DZY=/5Q1N9CSXFRE1_I7ipbIs1sneTlr8vaZ-S6Bf9Q5N7FM=) Please stay safe! **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

clean_body: | = Friends and Neighbors -- As of the latest forecast, hurricane warnings are now in effect for over 300 miles of the Gulf Coast of Florida and most forecast models currently have Hurricane Michael making landfall in the Panhandle sometime Wednesday afternoon. This is a big and dangerous storm, if you haven 't already now is the time to get prepared. Your smartphone can be the most powerful way to get prepared before the storm and help you navigate what comes after. Consider downloading the following apps or bookmarking the following websites: The Federal Emergency Management Agency: app at =** and web page at =. Offers storm preparation tips, shelter maps and maps of disaster recovery centers. Find an Evacuation Route: Go to = or the FL511 app. If you're evacuating, these sites provide a guide to road and bridge closures, toll suspensions and evacuation routes. You can also go to them after the storm to check road conditions and road closures. Find Local Shelters: Go to =. Enter your location to find the nearest open shelter. You can also download their app. Power Outages: Report outages at = or call 800-4-OUTAGE. To check power outages in your neighborhood, go to =**, where you can find the total outages in your area, the cause and estimates for when power will be restored. First Aid for People and Pets: Two Red Cross apps give advice on first aid for people and pets. Find them here: = Home improvement stores, gas stations, and grocery stores are likely to be busy as the storm approaches, which is why it is important to have a list planned out ahead of time. Here is a great sample checklist: Bottled water: Figure on 20 gallons for a family of four. Fruit, canned and dry goods: 20 cans of tuna, chicken, beans, chili, soups, can opener; fresh fruit; peanut butter, powdered drink mix, juices, cookies, cracker, chips, bread, pet food. Medications: Be sure you have prescription medications for up to two weeks. Batteries: All sizes to power flashlights. Paper goods: Freezer bags, garbage bags, paper plates, paper towels and bleach and bug spray Or, you can create your own based on the size of your family =. In addition to normal preparations like filling your vehicles with gas, buying fuel for generators, getting cash and identifying evacuation routes and storm shelters, n= Please stay safe! Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: This is not a drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ Democrats are strategizing ways to use their fundraising advantage to bombard Republican candidates with attack ads on television, radio, and online. Fellow Conservative,

I have alarming news. This year, Senate Democrats have built a substantial fundraising lead over Republicans. Democrats are strategizing ways to use their fundraising advantage to bombard Republican candidates with attack ads on television, radio, and online.

**With only 28 days until Election Day, we don’t have much time to catch up.**

Unless we take immediate action, Republican Senate candidates in battleground states will not have the resources needed to respond to negative and misleading attacks from the left. [**Donate today and a generous group of donors will quadruple-match your contribution.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjgyLWMzZjUwM2UwNjA4NDQ3ZDc5ZDk4NmJlODZkOGFkNGJj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3AYm9keV90eHRfZG9uYXRldG9kYXk%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hY3RuLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODEwMDlfQUUtR09QM19OZXd0R2luZ3JpY2gmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODEwMDlfdGhpc2lzbm90YWRyaWxsJmFjdGlvbj1lbWFpbF9jbGljayZoYTE9&K=5w07lLqbvIYeczCZy-Xptg)

Liberal elites are throwing everything they have towards winning races in battleground states. There is a real possibility that Republicans could lose the majority in the Senate and Chuck Schumer could take over as Majority Leader. If this happens, this would be disastrous for President Trump’s agenda. [**Please contribute now to stand with Senate Republicans as they fight to stop Schumer and the liberal establishment from taking over.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjgyLWMzZjUwM2UwNjA4NDQ3ZDc5ZDk4NmJlODZkOGFkNGJj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3AMjAxODEwMDlfdGhpc2lzbm90YWRyaWxs%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hY3RuLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODEwMDlfQUUtR09QM19OZXd0R2luZ3JpY2gmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODEwMDlfdGhpc2lzbm90YWRyaWxsJmFjdGlvbj1lbWFpbF9jbGljayZoYTE9&K=DfwoNCL15qx0CFtdQUrn5w)

name: Max Harris
subject: Last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

Last night, Mel faced Rep. Walorski in our first debate and the choice was clear: a career politician with a failed record on health care or Mel, a proven problem solver who will get results.

We're running ads right now comparing Rep. Walorski's record to Mel's vision -- and with just one week before our next debate, we urgently need your help to get our message out.

[Chip in $5 now to keep our ads on air.](https://act.myngp.com/el/luPlC5wXcsmsVWQ-KvIr-SqI05HhH9eO29uLT0XKeRk=/FTNz67fX3Ptc98V_buZXS6BxncCxY4pGH3ByYAcPLYM=?refcode=em181009)

During the debate, Mel talked about Rep. Walorski's 11 votes to take health care away from those with pre-existing conditions. He talked about the $3 million she's taken from corporate special interests. And he talked about his own plan to make Congress work for Hoosiers again.

It was a great night for our campaign -- but now, we have to make sure we spread the word to voters across Northern Indiana.

[_**Don 't wait -- please pitch in $5 to help us gain momentum before the next debate.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/luPlC5wXcsmsVWQ-KvIr-SqI05HhH9eO29uLT0XKeRk=/-VlJjp1ZYenf3IuvUWtWBr01BbdwHK5UcrSJo_lnqKU=?refcode=em181009)

Max Harris

name: Grace H. [Field Organizer]
subject: our volunteers need your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
There are just 28 days left until Election Day, and we need your help now more than ever to get out the vote for Amy.
We've recently reached out to ask supporters to sign up for volunteer shifts, but we know not everyone is able to knock on doors or make phone calls. **So if you 're unable to volunteer, we could _really_ use your help supporting our team out in the field with a contribution.**
When our volunteers talk with people who've already seen a yard sign in their neighborhood, or heard about Amy's work in the Senate from one of our ads, it's that much easier to remind them about the upcoming election.
And don't forget, President Trump lost Minnesota by less than 2 points in 2016. So we need the full support of our grassroots team this fall.
**Will you make a donation to help support our volunteers in the final stretch of this campaign?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

clean_body: Hi, There are just 28 days left until Election Day, and we need your help now more than ever to get out the vote for Amy. We've recently reached out to ask supporters to sign up for volunteer shifts, but we know not everyone is able to knock on doors or make phone calls. So if you 're unable to volunteer, we could really use your help supporting our team out in the field with a contribution. When our volunteers talk with people who've already seen a yard sign in their neighborhood, or heard about Amy's work in the Senate from one of our ads, it's that much easier to remind them about the upcoming election. And don't forget, President Trump lost Minnesota by less than 2 points in 2016. So we need the full support of our grassroots team this fall. Will you make a donation to help support our volunteers in the final stretch of this campaign? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** Thanks, Grace

name: Bredesen for Senate
subject: Taylor Swift
body:
| Peter -- since Taylor Swift announced she'd be voting for Phil Bredesen in this race, we've seen thousands of new voters register to vote, many for the first time, while hundreds have been signing up to volunteer and pitching in what they can to our campaign. Now the same partisan pundits and Washington politicians who tried to downplay our momentum in this race are attacking the impact she's had -- they still don't think a campaign about bringing people together to get things done can win. **Let's prove them wrong.** **Chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we can tune out these attacks and keep up our momentum into Election Day.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2556360/15078815/1272765920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQ2OWJjMS1mNmNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuB2HSGgABfrR_iUhoToE2pQdTEGRR3pQcAFZmw9h-M=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181009-tswift-2-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

---

* * *

Peter --
Last night, Taylor Swift dropped this message on Instagram:
_“I’m writing this post about the upcoming midterm elections on November 6th, in which I’ll be voting in the state of Tennessee. In the past I’ve been reluctant to publicly voice my political opinions, but due to several events in my life and in the world in the past two years, I feel very differently about that now. I always have and always will cast my vote based on which candidate will protect and fight for the human rights I believe we all deserve in this country...I will be voting for Phil Bredesen for Senate.”_
**In her long and heartfelt post** , Taylor decries Congressman Marsha Blackburn, saying: “I cannot vote for someone who will not be willing to fight for dignity for ALL Americans, no matter their skin color, gender or who they love.” **Instead, Taylor says: “I will be voting for Phil Bredesen for Senate.”**
The 10-time Grammy Award winner closes with a simple but powerful appeal to voters: “Educate yourself on the candidates running in your state and vote based on who most closely represents your values.” Within hours, Taylor’s words of support for Governor Bredesen generated more than 1 million likes on Instagram and touched off a positive frenzy in the news media and on social media.
Speaking out politically for the first time in her career, Taylor Swift explained the clear choice that voters have in this Senate race. **And Governor Bredesen thanked her on Twitter, saying: “I’m honored to have your support and that of so many Tennesseans who are ready to put aside the partisan shouting and get things done.”**
Taylor Swift isn’t the only one taking a stand in this race. Voters across Tennessee and from every background are coming together to make calls, knock on doors, and build up our campaign to get out the vote next month. Can we count on your help to keep building our momentum?
**Chip in $10 or whatever you can now to help us finish this race strong. Your support in these final weeks is key to making sure we have the resources we’ll need to win.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Tennesseans are ready to send Phil Bredesen to the U.S. Senate. And, taking a page from Taylor Swift’s songbook, they’re ready to send the message to Marsha Blackburn “We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together.”
Thanks to your help, we’ll get it done.
Laura Zapata

Laura Zapata Communications Director Team Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Ashley Walukevich
subject: DEFY HISTORY!
body:

We're going to be activating statewide **October 12th - October 16th** to reach our voters, test our GOTV operations, and show the strength of our Republican team in New Hampshire. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: 26 days. $26.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- We're closing in on Election Day. In fact, Thursday marks 26 days until voters head to the polls. And you've probably noticed that 26 is a significant number for us -- because here on Team Sherrod, our average online contribution is just $26. The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) is attacking me. Polls are tightening. President Trump is coming into town Friday for yet _another_ event with my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. **Through all of the obstacles we've faced so far, we've been able to hold our ground with[an average online contribution of $26.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c6/3421366561/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?refcode=sbe181009_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Between now and midnight on Thursday, our campaign needs 2,600 donors to match our average online contribution so we can continue fighting through the final 26 days of this race. [**Will you be one of those donors?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c6/3421366561/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?refcode=sbe181009_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c5/3421366561/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181009_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c5/3421366561/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181009_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c5/3421366561/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181009_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c6/3421366561/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?refcode=sbe181009_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** It's no secret that President Trump and the special interests want me to lose my job. I'm a perpetual thorn in their sides. I fight for Ohio consumers over Wall Street. I fight for workers' right to organize, families' right to healthcare, and women's right to make their own medical decisions. I fight like hell for the people in Ohio -- not the powerful special interests with armies of lobbyists, looking out for their bottom line. If that makes me a thorn, then I'm damn proud of it. Trump and the special interests know that won't change. So they attack me. They smear my record. They throw their support -- and their money -- behind my opponent. **But none of that will work as long as I have you fighting beside me, Peter.** [**One $26 average online contribution at a time, we fight together for the values we all believe in. With only 26 days left, let's show how strong this team is. If you can, be one of the 2,600 donors to give by Thursday.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c6/3421366561/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?refcode=sbe181009_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _Citizens United_ released a flood of outside spending in elections like this one. Unfortunately, all too often, campaigns become about which side has the deeper wallet, not the best ideas. Our campaign is different. We've put together one of the strongest grassroots movements in the country. This is the time to put it to work. | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe7d/4462dc26/7e443f87/2018c5c6/3421366561/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181009?refcode=sbe181009_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
With tremendous gratitude,
Sherrod

|

Now, Donald Trump Jr. is in Athens to host a rally for our opponent: [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa880/34a064cc/ffddafa/70dd8f3/1010844998/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDA5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE100918-full") The Trump family is all-in for Brian Kemp - which means we need to be all-in for Stacey during these final 28 days if we're going to beat them. So we're asking: **[Make a $3 donation to our campaign today to elect Stacey Abrams our next Governor and prove that Trump values are not Georgia values>>](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa880/34a064cc/ffddafa/70dd8f3/1010844998/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDA5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE100918-full")** If we work together, Brian Kemp and the Trumps won't stand a chance. -Team Abrams

name: =?utf-8?Q?Claudia=20via=20Ian=20Todd=20for=20Congress?=
subject: After this weekend, women are getting out to vote
body:
Last night I had the greatest phone call and I wanted to share it with you.

**
------------------------------------------------------------
Last night when I was making phone calls the funniest thing happened. I was talking to a young man who seemed unsure about voting and said that he was not planning on it. Then, in the background, I heard his wife shout something that was not terribly clear until I heard more from the man. He turned around and told me that he would certainly be voting, and voting for Democrats up and down the ticket.

Dedicated wives, mothers, and daughters are more motivated than ever to get their families out to vote this year and to make sure that people are standing up for women at every level of government. Today we are standing tall and holding our government accountable. Thank you for doing your part!

In Solidarity,

Claudia

This ad is perhaps Tim's strongest case yet for why his vision of One Minnesota matters.

From: Carrie Lucking, Campaign Manager
Subject: We need help

Friend,

Thank you -- so many folks stepped up last night that we were able to launch our new ad, "Nineteen."

The ad tells Tim's powerful health care story. Tim's dad died of cancer when he was just 19 years old and his chemotherapy wasn't covered by insurance. It cost Tim's mom a decade of going back to work to pay off the bills. He knows the importance of a future where everyone has access to quality and affordable health care. Minnesotans need to know that for Tim, health care isn't a policy issue -- it's a personal issue.

But here's the thing: **we ran the numbers, and if we raise an additional $6,500 by midnight tonight,** we can expand our ad buy and reach a bunch more Minnesotans.

name: Tim Ryan Voter HQ
subject: TODAY is the last day to register to vote in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
This is one of the most important elections in American history. We need EVERYBODY. Register, check the status of your registration, or apply for an absentee ballot now: | |
---
**Folks, TODAY, Tuesday, October 9 is the LAST DAY to register to vote in Ohio! ** This is one of the most important elections in American history. We need EVERYBODY. **[Register, check the status of your registration, or apply for an absentee ballot now:](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8a/2548650508/VEsH/ "http://www.vote.org/state/ohio/")** [GET VOTE READY >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8a/2548650508/VEsE/ "http://www.vote.org/state/ohio/") Other [important dates](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8d/2548650508/VEsF/ "http://www.sos.state.oh.us/elections/voters/voting-schedule/") to mark on your calendar : • Wednesday, October 10: Early in-person and absentee voting begins • Saturday, November 3: Deadline to request an absentee ballot • Monday, November 5: Absentee ballot postmark deadline **Make sure every single Ohioan you know has this information!** [Check Your Registration](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8a/2548650508/VEsC/ "http://www.vote.org/state/ohio/") [Spread the Word on Facebook](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8c/2548650508/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.vote.org%2Fstate%2Fohio%2F") [Spread the Word on Twitter](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8f/2548650508/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=The%20deadline%20to%20register%20to%20vote%20in%20Ohio%20is%20TODAY%2C%20Tuesday%2C%20October%209%21%0D%0A%0D%0ARegister%2C%20check%20your%20registration%2C%20or%20apply%20for%20an%20absentee%20ballot%20here%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.vote.org%2Fstate%2Fohio%2F%0D%0A%0D%0A%28via%20%40TimRyan%29&source=clicktotweet&related=clicktotweet") Thanks for all that you do, \-- Team Ryan P.S. All set to vote? [Help elect voting rights champions in Ohio >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8e/2548650508/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_cordray-clyde?refcode=em20181009_ohvoterreg_footer&tandembox=show&amount=20.18") [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcd8e/2548650508/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_cordray-clyde?refcode=em20181009_ohvoterreg_footer&tandembox=show&amount=20.18")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb1/2548650508/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb0/2548650508/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb3/2548650508/VEsHBA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb2/2548650508/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb5/2548650508/VEsHBg/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb1/2548650508/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93cb/5486deaa/2bed0905/dcfcdb0/2548650508/VEsHAA/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Jay Inslee
subject: How to show Trump you care about climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's time to take action.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9cd/2f5ea88d/74fc4da3/2cbc6806/2419975846/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Friend, **Did you see my op-ed last week in CNN?** [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9cd/2f5ea88d/74fc4da3/2cbc6806/2419975846/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Donald Trump sure has been blowing a lot of smoke on climate change recently. But we here in the West have been choking on it all summer. The terrible impact of climate change on our health, our economy, our property, and our lives is proven fact. So it's time to start electing people, from mayors to governors, who are willing to confront climate change -- before it's too late. I made just that case recently in a CNN op-ed. [**Read my op-ed, and then commit to talking to at least 10 of your friends about voting. It's time for all of us to take action.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9cd/2f5ea88d/74fc4da3/2cbc6806/2419975846/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Friend, we must start voting on climate change. And we can in just a few weeks, in voter initiatives and in elections for governors and state legislatures throughout the country. Combating climate change is the defining challenge of our time. It demands our attention, it demands our passion, and it demands our voting. This November, I hope you will get out and vote for an American clean energy future. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us to act -- now. clean_body: It's time to take action. | "" Friend, Did you see my op-ed last week in CNN? "" Donald Trump sure has been blowing a lot of smoke on climate change recently. But we here in the West have been choking on it all summer. The terrible impact of climate change on our health, our economy, our property, and our lives is proven fact. So it's time to start electing people, from mayors to governors, who are willing to confront climate change -- before it's too late. I made just that case recently in a CNN op-ed. "" Friend, we must start voting on climate change. And we can in just a few weeks, in voter initiatives and in elections for governors and state legislatures throughout the country. Combating climate change is the defining challenge of our time. It demands our attention, it demands our passion, and it demands our voting. This November, I hope you will get out and vote for an American clean energy future. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us to act -- now. "" Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | "" Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country. | ""

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Justice Kavanaugh gets to work
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 9, 2018
## **Justice Kavanaugh gets to work**
##
##
**Last night, history was made** as**** Brett M. Kavanaugh became the 114th Justice of the United States Supreme Court. Retiring Justice Anthony Kennedy administered the oath—the first time ever that a Justice has sworn in a former clerk to take his seat. **With his left hand on the Bible** and right hand raised in the air, Justice Kavanaugh swore to be a faithful, impartial arbiter of the law. “On the Supreme Court, I will seek to be a force for stability and unity,” he said during yesterday’s ceremony at the White House. “My goal is to be a great Justice for all Americans and for all of America.” **The work begins immediately.** Justice Kavanaugh took his seat this morning, hearing oral arguments for the first of several important cases this week. During last night’s ceremonial swearing-in, the American people saw a glimpse of how our nation’s newest Justice will approach these responsibilities. **“The Supreme Court is an institution of law.** It is not a partisan or political institution,” he said. “The Justices do not sit on opposite sides of an aisle. We do not caucus in separate rooms. The Supreme Court is a team of nine, and I will always be a team player on the team of nine.” [**Watch highlights from Justice Kavanaugh’s swearing-in ceremony.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9EFZsb1R0s8) **The reaction:** [**See the widespread support for Justice Kavanaugh’s confirmation**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wtas-support-justice-brett-kavanaughs-confirmation-supreme-court/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## **A message from President Trump on Hurricane Michael**
##
**With Hurricane Michael** quickly approaching landfall, President Trump has a clear message for people living in or near the Florida Panhandle region: The federal government is prepared to help in any way possible. “FEMA is ready.” **Today, the President approved an emergency declaration** for the state of Florida, giving first responders the support needed to keep people safe. The President’s authorization specifically allows FEMA to mobilize equipment and other resources to help lessen the impact of the storm. **FEMA expects sea levels to rise** as the storm makes landfall, and it urges all Floridians to take the potential storm surge and other safety threats seriously. “The window of time to prepare is quickly closing for those in the path of Hurricane Michael. According to [**NOAA NWS National Hurricane Center**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.facebook.com/NWSNHC/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARBI7qIIX5zGqg1isiwIkTDrJMhu6FKYayUOVxUFFR1nDoeJtW0f1JqHfkKMtHcVngsmvt8TapwQbwwN&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARC9Q4t-AIBvRrWVPjtQRUrvWi6-2Oe6ZZfqV2MjnjrvTfXmJB5LRYNqaMB-j1sNAznVVzS5OPTN_8LAxAjDHFVOVPwy3h_g2ymRahBsRcftw1iv7XI6gT2p2N92emtYnZeMyJMLDb8vo9zW3nb5JTeRkJSXtpGwDomZJIozmT7NMgGrSUU7Rgs) , tropical storm conditions will start tonight,” FEMA shared on Facebook today. [**See President Trump’s emergency declaration for Florida.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-florida-emergency-declaration-3/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **How to prepare** : [**FEMA’s latest update on Hurricane Michael**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.facebook.com/FEMA/photos/a.258799579964/10156255407379965/?type=3&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARC9Q4t-AIBvRrWVPjtQRUrvWi6-2Oe6ZZfqV2MjnjrvTfXmJB5LRYNqaMB-j1sNAznVVzS5OPTN_8LAxAjDHFVOVPwy3h_g2ymRahBsRcftw1iv7XI6gT2p2N92emtYnZeMyJMLDb8vo9zW3nb5JTeRkJSXtpGwDomZJIozmT7NMgGrSUU7Rgs&__tn__=-R)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump, Brett M. Kavanaugh, and retired Justice Anthony M. Kennedy walk together to the East Room of the White House for the ceremonial swearing-in of Brett Kavanaugh as Associate Justice of the Supreme Court** | October 8, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA5Ljk2MDAwMDQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOS45NjAwMDA0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3NzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Team Kaine
subject: "Stewart now has the backing of President Donald Trump and could be the first Republican to win a statewide contest in Virginia since 2009."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1014/3e0906/762a700c/3e37bf77/1528716684/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&source=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND")

| | Derek, look at this quote from the news covering last week's debate: | **" Stewart now has the backing of President Donald Trump and could be the first Republican to win a statewide contest in Virginia since 2009."** _\- WJHL TV news coverage of the October 2nd debate_
---
We are in the homestretch of the campaign and there is a lot of national attention on Virginia - _especially_ on the potential impact of the president's involvement, on Corey Stewart's smear campaign against Tim Kaine, and on competitive Virginia House races.

**So now in this final month, we have one sole focus:** Run a statewide program that empowers all Virginians to make their voices heard. But unfortunately, not every eligible Virginian _is_ registered to vote, and not everyone who is registered knows how and when to get their ballot in.

**That 's why we're launching an effort to put [$50,000 more into our Get Out the Vote Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1014/3e0906/762a700c/3e37bf4b/1528716684/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+50000+more+into+our+Get+Out+the+Vote+Fun&utm_campaign=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&source=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND") specifically to register and empower new voters before the registration deadline [on Monday.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1014/3e0906/762a700c/3e37bf4e/1528716684/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+on+Monday&utm_campaign=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&source=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND")**

[Help Tim Kaine and Virginia Democrats reach our new goal of $50,000 before Virginia's voter registration deadline on Monday, October 15th to help us register new voters and get all Virginians to the ballot box.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1014/3e0906/762a700c/3e37bf43/1528716684/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Help+Tim+Kaine+and+Virginia+Democrats+re&utm_campaign=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&source=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND")

---
Every dollar you give helps register new voters, inform them on how to submit absentee ballots, and educate folks on their options for House and local candidates.

Derek, _all_ Virginians should get a say in who their leaders are. [Contribute to this all-level, statewide fund today](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1014/3e0906/762a700c/3e37bf50/1528716684/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+Contribute+to+this+alllevel+statewide+fu&utm_campaign=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&source=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND"). And as always, if you still need to register to vote or know someone who might, [please click here!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1014/3e0906/762a700c/3e37bf55/1528716684/VEsHBg/ "https://iwillvote.com/va?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+please+click+here&utm_campaign=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND&source=20181009_1_FR_TEAM_intro-LDND")

Thanks,

Team Kaine

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: can you help, friends?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's that time here on the campaign trail: We're so close to the election that my team is counting down the days until November 6th.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e84/1a8421e1/19a4d80c1/49336235/4254595862/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Can you help me out today, friends? It's that time here on the campaign trail: We're so close to the election that my team is counting down the days until November 6th. **And, as of today, we 're 28 days --_exactly four weeks_ \-- out.** And my far-right opponent recently released a shock poll claiming a small lead, so it's going to be all hands on deck here in AZ-01 all the way through the end. [**Can you help me end this race strong and regain the lead with a donation today, friends? Because when I say it 's all hands on deck, I mean we're really counting on this entire grassroots team to power us through.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's a bit hard to believe that we're already four weeks out from Election Day. Just two years ago, we were entering the final stretch of my first campaign for Congress, and the time since, when I've had the distinct honor of representing Arizonans in Washington, has absolutely flown by.

But we really are in the final stretch now, friends, and we have a lot of work ahead of us. We must tell every last voter in our district about the work I'm doing for them in Congress, and we must get our supporters to the polls to make sure this seat stays blue.

**As the most vulnerable Democrat in the House,** I am taking nothing for granted. I hope you won't either. [**Make a donation today if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

** **
** **

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" ---|---|--- "=" | "=" | "=" It's a bit hard to believe that we're already four weeks out from Election Day. Just two years ago, we were entering the final stretch of my first campaign for Congress, and the time since, when I've had the distinct honor of representing Arizonans in Washington, has absolutely flown by. But we really are in the final stretch now, friends, and we have a lot of work ahead of us. We must tell every last voter in our district about the work I'm doing for them in Congress, and we must get our supporters to the polls to make sure this seat stays blue. As the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, I am taking nothing for granted. I hope you won't either. "=" Yours, Tom ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Steve King thinks this is "radical"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Steve King sent a desperate fundraising email today that called me his “ _radical opponent_.”
I’d love to know what he considers “radical.”
Is wanting Americans to have access to affordable health care really radical?
What about tax breaks for the working class?
Fighting to take big money out of politics?
Believing that climate change is real when the evidence is all around us?
Thinking it’s possible to bring people together to work for our future?
Are these ideas really so radical?
**Maybe if Steve King wasn't afraid to debate me, we'd find out. **
[**_Chip in today to support our “radical” agenda!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2560070/15112777/1333702859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQxNmIyNC0xOGNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20VPIJo7k4kK8_90T1d9nQQfptHonWQ6xumEgvRMMnc=)
Radical means fundamentally changing something.
A health care system where people have to create GoFund me pages to pay for surgery, needs to be fundamentally changed.
A tax code that lets the people at the top pay a substantially lower rate than those at the bottom needs to be changed.
A government and a Congress that allow money to buy influence and elections needs to be changed.
A system that is destroying our planet so that a select few can profit needs to be changed.
A political climate that constantly pits “us” versus “them” needs to be changed.

**Maybe I am a little bit radical after all.**
Maybe it’s time for all of us to get a little “radical” together—[** _chip in what you can today to help retire Steve King._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2560071/15112778/1333702859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQxNmIyNC0xOGNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20VPIJo7k4kK8_90T1d9nQQfptHonWQ6xumEgvRMMnc=)
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2560072/15112779/1333702859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQxNmIyNC0xOGNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20VPIJo7k4kK8_90T1d9nQQfptHonWQ6xumEgvRMMnc=)
