name: Tim Walz
subject: I'm about to head out on stage...
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend,

I'm about to head out on stage for a debate with my Republican opponent. This is one of the last opportunities we have to share our visions for Minnesota, and the contrast is clear.

My opponent believes we are better off divided and that our best days are behind us. I don't give up that easily. I believe in One Minnesota, where everyone has the opportunity to get a quality education, access affordable healthcare, and have a good-paying job.

**[Will you stand with me tonight as I take on my opponent's divisive brand of politics?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9SFHL8yMuY2CCPWoXAwtijgNwxFTpiTY7nza3N-0r5A=/_QB_lDRWWv7F5FFktYfiviH-8GQQ2BN6B9YhCwltcb8=?refcode=20181009.2nd&amount=10)**

I'm so grateful for your support.

28 days until the election -- will you stand with me?

Tim

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Last night, Wisconsinites saw the real Tammy Baldwin. They saw someone who, rather than leading for our middle-class families and defending the....

Friend,

Last night, Wisconsinites saw the real Tammy Baldwin. They saw someone who, rather than leading for our middle-class families and defending the Wisconsin Way, is more concerned about launching false attacks and ignoring facts.

Tammy Baldwin made it clearer than ever: she’d be much more comfortable hanging with her friends in the Hamptons than rolling up her sleeves and fighting for our home.

We need a fighter. Not “business-as-usual” Baldwin.
[STOP TAMMY BALDWIN: $25 >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo4z0SS-2anqJ1VCe4fCsUjKmoIH54zPD35ZY3rmuy4N3v6VyVkjpX7cZ06_V_atyxrhbLw9KSxmxRF7SDbNjRsU9JavYf0sx9K9F5E8ZJaANJJqBOn5M8SoartFXF6Whnqv2SURy37muOa04WOoOnFvGvPd8ThUu2QLdAnwiZE5k_rw-ZILhFSjdUfNqVHOGIOQx5_J3LDIyi07RntrJezzuxjVsZHj1ZhJcpm0tzzbYeS8a_jejzWUZjfK7210_szm5ZeXnJoRPAM-eGH2OryXghMNIoJ0CH-SdwdQWYuvTGUx4hRgzskTAPfroQj4W2U0l9B4XucygUI6o5BzMFB8VOgPWWTcAJg-uIQcgZgANqsWnW5X3UANePc-9umLluTrPR2qKqM9hkzKL5Bl38SWM%3D)
---

Baldwin solidified three “themes of the night:” Dodging questions, misrepresenting my record, and spreading falsehoods... but Wisconsinites could see right through her lies.
* Baldwin turned her back on the veterans at the Tomah VA. [**TELL TAMMY: THAT’S A DISGRACE.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=ZMZ_5pU4a-w1PknhnImzilJq2OVO--ogBVWI8mkw8GVpmOxvwSx17ThavXFTqS26R-MSI8Fcb2nnxSRZVqkxh_O6AJeMeY7YOfxvh1NKgy6-laILHwVbF73yqHOPBrOnCEgtcD1z69dfS42EF4fCO9K_-tnC_0WVYwJJ2iij1oT7gv_KNDG8uFFzPZDuWsE4roqo-0ybQ8onDmxcLOkFDdOAc-mj_TEh9z_vVOve11WI36hEJz2j4knoUz8ZZfm01AbciPr_5Fxxj2PX2MP-BL825ilCexlr7v8T-GA-p9Jl2jm6ZZLlgPuM1jFIHeAY90CugO4nXFohaKy2WPt51B6b9oQuNfEzo724YD4FYVR6ehAX6DTDC52nusOm9eSRqSNKqarEFP8D8Rhhm2wehg%3D%3D)

* And to make matters worse, she tried to cover it all up. **[TELL TAMMY: THAT’S WRONG](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=ZMZ_5pU4a-w1PknhnImzilJq2OVO--ogBVWI8mkw8GVpmOxvwSx17ThavXFTqS26R-MSI8Fcb2nnxSRZVqkxh_O6AJeMeY7YOfxvh1NKgy6-laILHwVbF73yqHOPBrOnCEgtcD1z69dfS42EF4fCO9K_-tnC_0WVYwJJ2iij1oR7fk43inS0CIhuVWT-FoFZllFGwY_766F5mOIg01tOzx1JJqdn_lzVmhL4HrUr92LRp_NAdC4iM-KSk4kTMj2igzxZ_iYlHaIHRk47CDIqvNJbnTBo9vy43zEYv_y58nT6ZR0X3V1Vys5NP6LCAuIqb_25UkWcy4YSaYtDTc9FesbUgAsT3j2v8pqTI8qCdl8rB5xLbpwluIDgqop5Chpni_7_5dSTBkzhYPILcBGHXQ%3D%3D).**

* Baldwin’s $32 trillion healthcare scheme would get rid of Medicaid, the ACA, Tricare, and private insurance. [**TELL TAMMY: IT WON’T WORK.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=ZMZ_5pU4a-w1PknhnImzilJq2OVO--ogBVWI8mkw8GVpmOxvwSx17ThavXFTqS26R-MSI8Fcb2nnxSRZVqkxh_O6AJeMeY7YOfxvh1NKgy6-laILHwVbF73yqHOPBrOnCEgtcD1z69dfS42EF4fCO9K_-tnC_0WVYwJJ2iij1oRlHK2ySw8g8Kysu-ZWR7-q4ASJicHcsohENzbwZg5-E7JlQz7inXQYZeGWid-fDl6naF0RXHFi38q5Dz-RXHdisgbehZIGclUmi-ezNJ-efOguWRfRp45q8jPXyZZOuQv_ZUDOePXpffFcYwbKcum5IcvFXS5R9cxhsOJL41g15sULayIALFi2tO0CS1ZGiY-x_xeCsV0msj1HHU7t35KfpnZw-oDGZx76HHBalRjS1A%3D%3D)

* Baldwin thinks big government and its endless regulations create jobs. [**TELL TAMMY: SHE’S GOT IT BACKWARDS.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=ZMZ_5pU4a-w1PknhnImzilJq2OVO--ogBVWI8mkw8GVpmOxvwSx17ThavXFTqS26R-MSI8Fcb2nnxSRZVqkxh_O6AJeMeY7YOfxvh1NKgy6-laILHwVbF73yqHOPBrOnCEgtcD1z69dfS42EF4fCO9K_-tnC_0WVYwJJ2iij1oSVOLeWoJDMTwCTkz7mLrL4C5mFfPdEvSrCNNs1zSezm6nnw4WVYucK5QrZDM9ZH65d8axrWxQfVlWeTxrm9guMUNkYEErhFfh2sS7E2y5HXZf5krv3z-3BGwzEsVMl7J_WETgtBiKc0VMEv41yfoCiaSwoOT-5H9i5iGu4ZE_NMDgrV3y0caEw9r9libT5ECNUAXDQv_-G0Scmkxqx4jxdWDR0unxrg_ycaahm4Cbnzw%3D%3D)

Friend, if it wasn’t already crystal clear, it is now. Tammy Baldwin will say anything to get re-elected, even if it means compromising the well-being of Wisconsin families and businesses.

It has never been more important to do your duty as a resident of Wisconsin, and STAND UP AGAINST TAMMY BALDWIN.

[STOP TAMMY BALDWIN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo4z0SS-2anqJ1VCe4fCsUjKmj-DMy6F2CpcwFJhvvQo0DF2GmeEox4KRDfeUB_lkzONo9OFfUHodb-t38ZgPXvQWIkyx29mlE4Gv4lOIGKA9MNFAcdRtI28EiaWp46PRl5j_sV75RFnqnSNpcvVUPvvhPQkqjRe8OiAhKhZ0RP-F-g8WEB0V6zhwTIruhaRKnd3yWRpI5sVLh7kGK61aTh5j3_JPKFs-Z4blqPwzz4vNpebzKjTZq8PwPyapTc4aWIUqjofXvPRbUEdL3F-nUPZ6zwB_27nM8kziqS1xrBaTCahUjkD8NOLD7wXRqp9hYpWkdf-CjUTXK6-OvvhJ_YaotRbKCixl3AOPeY95RdpzhAnPNyqTgvDvu0Jb9pUglkQ%3D%3D)
---

Let’s continue adding to last night’s momentum, friend. Let’s keep Baldwin **far away** from the U.S. Senate. I need you to do your part now!

\- Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo49dDRx2p8CxPqWHiiCdi67Rm7VTCnWoCC_BglZZ0uk5Ar97yK_ZvPRHd4mJJpmhunaiLHD6cUkvKYlOBR6szAyOCy4BbobFcpXun5m1UkTSKLd3FdHUs1JhuF03jLg97BuiF3SMrvgNJHlpqW8YqrmxYis6iqcPdzGdepR8FKURVsor-_NuE68YB9TNt7ILGZ1kdP-z6bMIThntYt5H_kW3pKapQg2j-GexXOc27yvzBHF17ZjJ3Z968LS3npZRNWQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo469_Ll9NoQvlEeAPIbHskzbYXvIrNTn8o2UccpRcZ7ulDbGW5PDn5WpT2ZKkpaxq0ekFu4HlrPByHJPf_S7TDl0Ni6qF_1Ni9g2zb3QDYToIDBD4nPHsO83fenBXZTfAR2zXA7uw4vF3u3bTpd_ooXpXg4qBpHeSTcN8NYnn5DenzawJP5TpNs1OfnU0ZvuJGqsqdxOLwimxwOzNYOlSkEScoJ9u0pxaogjXsYJezSmBtQcjGJC1wCG4_yjUbkp3fw%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=u7EyDEPnbj4hK87OMx626HskCqzgSh-ieQfczGDOmLed0BSZ9YA-E3RsFXH3o7H6sQSRT6kttzCAdOZeYNRZfTIdxwucA0G0vqPJYoFZMcWSy6NrPVHZNdhkRGOT58txqeOmsOU9a_HSR9lCg8A8U3Lw9gDIv0SUnVgDEopQiWlf73V1YBGUzaZt539UimAgK9KE5qS9Daw7bZ-FQceDjiL9-p0QO3IrizH5yd5UN4q4zFKMvqqxXIhoO01pjd4a). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo41a-LwG5dsayold3xgIG_5ii6Eg3hXpti316bogbx4VFebeHNApGn4NfyuHagUsxhyqHEdUNv3BIHuullU29HXQXc4Kbl25cvHwp-ORpIA7oJmusGyJaESVRHqmbPmT_Qedn5e8K8iCWgbPMafwNZbiUqbDTgWRFa8V3UlbOhC17emOPKMIaJ6vuTcdKL989i_HUMNWo2_PupAf-SG_Fl3T7QC4-AT1YObmzP-3yOfBB_O8LXqdffcxB0wIlpkHLXhXQY1FXXdJ4tlKBnKkpi7XPtVFLQqMJuJEAjFccvn7ZiK5CsU4AV0rJWBaiNqJT_Fq4UVTJXpiEARbeE5nHo_uOPK71drodthad6esN8lOz) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo41a-LwG5dsayold3xgIG_5jH9SqHKXiYrJXdSbUk98chmA0mn8VzAaQj9lrYSwNi599y-4xNONxzTsiATqY_3_3HLaxBXuC7-OmpqIIGie2_fibIWMG2GFAS2xcN2E39qdh-CUAiLcf6fr3_mxITCmeGWkNSU3uKDbADO8wgYSJMyhoByRu0oJ4oAzF_pYYgiAJHwHsMQncF9ugPYLxmrOnHE_TLuAxwKwqdWE50N4MA-qqIgGt45IJrGjMzURtVq2Kz3oFbSdScRzBsaUZ9_PUdvKg-Mjp5Ibsi77YLorT1fFmXQugPSrCL-iHrZDoninY35lcs0zUArezGrV0nk408DBouw8tKsffnQiXixRv1) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo49dDRx2p8CxPqWHiiCdi67Rm7VTCnWoCC_BglZZ0uk5AwAPxFX6Fv_-rZNJcMo_N9_dynfuExv0_ZGxnkx4_3c3EfDksuq0p_ZLIrM4APzMePxSVS6iCwDyYx2q_bmV8wTgUE7tRLwt1ZiQ9hbRUnLWVnNs1Px7rIhEAz1DZv3Y_k8AJ3-PbhiioGDXQJ_TP5j2Mytnlr3zW8fu1rumEcS252J1ZSeOf7MtNDmVZLX1Pea1Eouoonot5V8WoYyYxDw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo469_Ll9NoQvlEeAPIbHskzbYXvIrNTn8o2UccpRcZ7ulZLY1_d9_KOAKX8zZePYhhR8Tqnu8WCiTF7emfNeHeuhSsIR3IjnNjPPXi4JMA9mrtLp9mLnbDVSHpBWUGfJnUrif91mVow7hGWqZplbPj5yWfcctyUfV1wJKLmqktsFn-7m_z2z7_u7Qk2tlCPNbvBt61XHpiyhCjlcmGRJ0__Cr4lK9mXhaR0CchG46u3l2jfl5ik0MoO_aIhzOsGpM5A%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo4wYu_xrGLXGzjqUoBamKSf8sebjp4SeoGuhCB38JBHyb3gcOzMh_x0H_UUgptkW0uM2nXCdNeP-DHVNL8OgBi2cbdxRnNrKYwd9sRa-kiX-In-bFd2AbgEkywFwsVAQDvhu5LQ2Xxb2LcTTdWjWCxbICzrxmdfJIGOsyvEPu348WWz27NezjUi39A-cyP-tk79P00lIjsq0IZQYQxG8wNO30EvncO_ieaWIrhdLHNamahD0fEUxLBV58ZI4ewaOTLA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=cz8aGCg8lfRF_w2Tmuyo41a-LwG5dsayold3xgIG_5ioHU4qddZBXCB4Lq1YfqRWojNRPM__PLhNsI4xoFoBCatOs-znFSrsqG_WI-WGyIY57mUjN2BFrnZGY58Nd1Hp-vA7218mjcMvKp069S2Ezd8CaSuZbQBAUoScNMMerTMHTHeR0OJPfJ35aNVDhXHzhw0krhXsQMCEVU7miuNywRNvd_KgMzb-4CPPqsGg9RuTjA9hg38p-U2mK6KDy_QMP8NWaBmmt3ybyqlAhcKPgWtGt_jlLo4eJC0COOAxONnfqABU2IGUXgRIUMMrvrb4657NvyWvhFyDbTOm9UZ1GF4Cw-GlsbmmA-71DmPKC7u2TfmNoI6tmjWgP1u3e9gEYPgSLrikn1mzq94WFM5FNA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=u7EyDEPnbj4hK87OMx626HskCqzgSh-ieQfczGDOmLed0BSZ9YA-E3RsFXH3o7H6sQSRT6kttzCAdOZeYNRZfTIdxwucA0G0vqPJYoFZMcWSy6NrPVHZNdhkRGOT58txqeOmsOU9a_HSR9lCg8A8U3Lw9gDIv0SUnVgDEopQiWlf73V1YBGUzaZt539UimAgK9KE5qS9Daw7bZ-FQceDjiL9-p0QO3IrizH5yd5UN4q4zFKMvqqxXIhoO01pjd4a) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=52327ec5c89e4e1dafa7c7e681ad707c&_e=u7EyDEPnbj4hK87OMx626HskCqzgSh-ieQfczGDOmLed0BSZ9YA-E3RsFXH3o7H6sQSRT6kttzCAdOZeYNRZfTIdxwucA0G0vqPJYoFZMcWSy6NrPVHZNdhkRGOT58txqeOmsOU9a_HSR9lCg8A8U3Lw9gDIv0SUnVgDEopQiWlf73V1YBGUzaZt539UimAgK9KE5qS9Daw7bZ-FQceDjiL9-p0QO3IrizH5yd5UN4q4zFKMvqqxXIhoO01pjd4a) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Last night, Wisconsinites saw the real Tammy Baldwin. They saw someone who, rather than leading for our middle-class families and defending the.... Friend, Last night, Wisconsinites saw the real Tammy Baldwin. They saw someone who, rather than leading for our middle-class families and defending the Wisconsin Way, is more concerned about launching false attacks and ignoring facts. Tammy Baldwin made it clearer than ever: she’d be much more comfortable hanging with her friends in the Hamptons than rolling up her sleeves and fighting for our home. We need a fighter. Not “business-as-usual” Baldwin. Baldwin solidified three “themes of the night:” Dodging questions, misrepresenting my record, and spreading falsehoods... but Wisconsinites could see right through her lies. Baldwin turned her back on the veterans at the Tomah VA. And to make matters worse, she tried to cover it all up. . Baldwin’s $32 trillion healthcare scheme would get rid of Medicaid, the ACA, Tricare, and private insurance. Baldwin thinks big government and its endless regulations create jobs. Friend, if it wasn’t already crystal clear, it is now. Tammy Baldwin will say anything to get re-elected, even if it means compromising the well-being of Wisconsin families and businesses. It has never been more important to do your duty as a resident of Wisconsin, and STAND UP AGAINST TAMMY BALDWIN. Let’s continue adding to last night’s momentum, friend. Let’s keep Baldwin far away from the U.S. Senate. I need you to do your part now! \- Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: counting down to Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Now that this campaign to bring new leadership to Virginia's 7th district has entered the home stretch, my team is counting down the days until Election Day. We even have a makeshift countdown clock up on the wall in our campaign office.
| | Peter, Now that this campaign to bring new leadership to Virginia's 7th district has entered the home stretch, my team is counting down the days until Election Day. **We even have a makeshift countdown clock up on the wall in our campaign office:** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/KYFmG6SQRVxbOsxBTjAEcOmG2hseYmJQxaUudrPwNpk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Now, we're 28 days out from November 6th -- _just four weeks._ And we have a lot to accomplish in that short time. We must continue to reach undecided voters at their doors, we must hand out more campaign literature, and we must register more supporters to vote before the deadline coming up next week. [**Will you make a donation to power us through these final 28 days, Peter?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/KYFmG6SQRVxbOsxBTjAEcOmG2hseYmJQxaUudrPwNpk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Now, you might wonder if [**your grassroots donations**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/KYFmG6SQRVxbOsxBTjAEcOmG2hseYmJQxaUudrPwNpk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) really make a difference in a race of this size, Peter -- **and I promise you, they do.** This is a pure toss-up, with multiple polls now showing a tied race. In a campaign this close, every voter and ever dollar truly matter. [**If you 'd like, you can support my team's efforts at this important time with a donation here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/KYFmG6SQRVxbOsxBTjAEcOmG2hseYmJQxaUudrPwNpk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, as always, for your support. \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/KYFmG6SQRVxbOsxBTjAEcOmG2hseYmJQxaUudrPwNpk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/KYFmG6SQRVxbOsxBTjAEcOmG2hseYmJQxaUudrPwNpk=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/RPsM7giHcZVWHmGtNlM62nJe0wCSmls35BD_tqQmJJY=/LrRlkSWY-aOZ_DPzBePJEC79vcreDVTAlDq5BKWcf-Y=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

body:

* * *
Peter,

In August, Linda introduced you to Gil Cisneros, the Democratic nominee for Congress in California's 39th District. A veteran and businessman, Gil has worked to create and fund several scholarships for Latino youth -- encouraging students to dream bigger and reach higher.

A brand-new poll has Gil leading his Republican opponent by just one point, 49% to 48%. That's _way_ too close to call, so we need to put all the grassroots energy we can into this race with just four weeks left to go. **[Chip in to help us elect Gil Cisneros to Congress>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. We don't need to tell you again the importance of taking back the House of Representatives this November -- a Democratic majority will protect the rights of all Americans, our healthcare, and Social Security.

Republicans are blanketing the airwaves in CA-39 with attack ads, lies, and false promises to stop Gil's win in November. **They know that if Democrats win this race, it becomes far more likely that the House will flip.**

Team Sanchez

name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Just 28 days
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3686/9e00690/51d8d1ad/24018f14/3968162874/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181009_28days_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&source=em18_181009_28days_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx")
The clock is ticking, friends. In just 28 days, Florida will head to the polls to elect a new Governor.

It's not just Mayor Andrew Gillum and our opponent on the ballot, though -- it's the right for every Floridian to have affordable healthcare, investments in our students and teachers, and protections for our land, water, and coasts. And while we have the momentum to win, we can't rest until the results come in on Election Day.

That's why we're asking for your help to fund our get-out-the-vote efforts. **[Will you chip in $5 now so that we can let voters across the state know Mayor Gillum is the Governor we need to lead Florida forward?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3686/9e00690/51d8d1ad/24018f2c/3968162874/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-28-days-vid?gpsid=13_55_4291&refcode=em18_181009_28days_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181009_28days_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+chip+in++ask++now+so+that+we+ca")**

Our strategy from day one was not only to speak to as many Floridians as possible, but also to listen to as many Floridians as possible. So, in these final 28 days of the general election, we'll be making phone calls and knocking on doors in cities across the state to make sure every voter hears about our bold, progressive plans.

**[Mayor Gillum will rebuild our state into one that works for all of us, but we need your help for our final push in these last four weeks.
